title: romulea pilosa
intro: Romulea pilosa, also known as the hairy romulea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Romulea pilosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
